positioning: Outcome-first AI skills library for creators, operators, developers, analysts, and everyday users.

groups.name: Creator Command Center
groups.purpose: Content systems, AI visuals, SEO, launches, communities, and creator commerce.

groups.name: Business & Revenue
groups.purpose: Founder operations, sales, support, ecommerce, local services, and client work.

groups.name: Product, Developer & Research
groups.purpose: Product discovery, UX, coding-agent rules, security review, and research workflows.

groups.name: Documents, Data & Decisions
groups.purpose: Reports, decks, spreadsheets, analysis, dashboards, and decision artifacts.

groups.name: Communication & Productivity
groups.purpose: Email, calendar, docs, collaboration, weekly planning, and workspace productivity.

groups.name: Finance, Legal, People & Home
groups.purpose: High-stakes admin support with disclaimers, review gates, and human escalation.

groups.name: Live Connectors & Automations
groups.purpose: Connector-dependent workflows with read-only-first and approval-before-write rules.

groups.name: Meta Systems
groups.purpose: Skill creation, memory, prompt engineering, and library maintenance.

qualityStandard: Every skill must produce an operational artifact, not only advice.
Every connector skill must verify live app access and tool names before claiming results.
Every high-stakes skill must separate facts, assumptions, and professional review needs.
Every SKILL.md must work outside Grok by avoiding Grok-only assumptions.
